---
title: "CVD Surveillance Metrics"
subtitle: "Live updates"
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    scrolling: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* ------------------------------------------------------------
   TOP TITLE / NAVIGATION SPACING

   These rules add breathing space between:
   - the dashboard title
   - the subtitle
   - the dashboard tabs
------------------------------------------------------------ */

.quarto-dashboard #title-block-header,
#title-block-header.quarto-title-block {
  margin-bottom: 1.0rem !important;
}

.quarto-dashboard .quarto-title .title,
.quarto-title .title {
  margin-bottom: 0.45rem !important;
}

.quarto-dashboard .quarto-title .subtitle,
.quarto-title .subtitle {
  margin-top: 0.25rem !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.85rem !important;
}

.quarto-dashboard .nav-tabs,
.quarto-dashboard .navbar-nav,
.quarto-dashboard .dashboard-nav,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-navs {
  margin-top: 0.45rem !important;
}


/* ------------------------------------------------------------
   DASHBOARD CARD SPACING

   Quarto dashboard cards have generous default padding. These rules
   make the dashboard denser so charts and tables are visible without
   excessive scrolling.
------------------------------------------------------------ */

.quarto-dashboard .card,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-card {
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
}

.quarto-dashboard .card-header,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-card .card-header {
  padding: 0.3rem 0.65rem !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
}

.quarto-dashboard .card-body,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-card .card-body {
  padding: 0.5rem 0.7rem !important;
}

.quarto-dashboard .card-title,
.quarto-dashboard h2.card-title {
  margin-bottom: 0.2rem !important;
  font-size: 1rem !important;
}

.quarto-dashboard .dashboard-page,
.quarto-dashboard .dashboard-row,
.quarto-dashboard .dashboard-column {
  gap: 0.18rem !important;
}

/* Top-align content inside dashboard cards */
.quarto-dashboard .card,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-card,
.quarto-dashboard .card-body,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-card .card-body,
.quarto-dashboard .html-fill-container,
.quarto-dashboard .html-fill-item {
  justify-content: flex-start !important;
  align-items: stretch !important;
  align-content: flex-start !important;
}


/* ------------------------------------------------------------
   SIDEBAR: LIGHT FLATLY-COMPATIBLE TREATMENT

   Flatly uses clean light greys and a dark blue-grey text colour.
   This keeps the sidebar quieter than the default darker grey.
------------------------------------------------------------ */

.quarto-dashboard .sidebar,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-sidebar-layout > .sidebar,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-sidebar-layout > aside {
  background-color: #f8f9fa !important;
  border-right: 1px solid #dfe6e9 !important;
}

.quarto-dashboard .sidebar label,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-sidebar-layout > .sidebar label,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-sidebar-layout > aside label {
  color: #2c3e50 !important;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.quarto-dashboard .sidebar select,
.quarto-dashboard .sidebar input,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-sidebar-layout > .sidebar select,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-sidebar-layout > .sidebar input,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-sidebar-layout > aside select,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-sidebar-layout > aside input {
  border-color: #bdc3c7 !important;
}


/* ------------------------------------------------------------
   OBSERVABLE OUTPUTS

   Observable tables and plots can otherwise look slightly different
   from surrounding Bootstrap text.
------------------------------------------------------------ */

.observablehq table {
  margin-bottom: 0.2rem !important;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
}

.observablehq p {
  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
}


/* ------------------------------------------------------------
   OBSERVABLE PLOT TEXT AND LEGENDS

   This forces Observable Plot SVG text and Plot legends to use the same
   readable size as the CVD-BURDEN-001 charts. This is especially important
   for the CVD-BURDEN-002 stacked bar charts.
------------------------------------------------------------ */

.observablehq svg text {
  font-size: 15px !important;
  font-family: inherit !important;
}

.observablehq .plot-swatches,
.observablehq .plot-swatches *,
.observablehq .plot-swatches-wrap,
.observablehq .plot-swatches-wrap *,
.observablehq .plot-ramp,
.observablehq .plot-ramp * {
  font-size: 15px !important;
  font-family: inherit !important;
}


/* ------------------------------------------------------------
   INTERPRETATION PANEL
------------------------------------------------------------ */

.bnr-interpretation {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.35;
}

.bnr-interpretation-title {
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
}

.bnr-interpretation-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(120px, 160px) 1fr;
  gap: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
}

.bnr-interpretation-label {
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #333;
}

.bnr-interpretation-value {
  min-width: 0;
  white-space: normal;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}


/* ------------------------------------------------------------
   HEADLINE CARDS
------------------------------------------------------------ */

.bnr-card-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(150px, 1fr));
  gap: 0.7rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}

.bnr-headline-card {
  border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
  border-radius: 0.35rem;
  padding: 0.7rem 0.75rem;
  background: #fff;
}

.bnr-headline-label {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #444;
  margin-bottom: 0.15rem;
}

.bnr-headline-value {
  font-size: 1.65rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.1;
}

.bnr-headline-note {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: #666;
  margin-top: 0.2rem;
}


/* ------------------------------------------------------------
   CHART TITLES AND LEGENDS
------------------------------------------------------------ */

.bnr-chart-title {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: 0.25rem 0 0.35rem 0;
  color: #2c3e50;
}

.bnr-trend-note {
  margin: 0 0 0.4rem 0;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  color: #333;
}

.bnr-chart-legend {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.45rem 1.2rem;
  align-items: center;
  margin: 0 0 0.45rem 0;
  font-size: 0.92rem !important;
  line-height: 1.25;
}

.bnr-chart-legend,
.bnr-chart-legend * {
  font-size: 0.92rem !important;
}

.bnr-chart-legend-item {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.35rem;
}

.bnr-legend-line {
  display: inline-block;
  width: 28px;
  height: 0;
  border-top: 3px solid;
}

.bnr-legend-swatch {
  display: inline-block;
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
  border-radius: 0.2rem;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  background-color: #6c757d;
}

.bnr-card-grid.bnr-two-card-grid {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(150px, 1fr));
}

.bnr-swatch-under-50,
.bnr-swatch-under-45 {
  background-color: #e8f1f2 !important;
}

.bnr-swatch-50-59,
.bnr-swatch-45-54 {
  background-color: #c7dfe5 !important;
}

.bnr-swatch-60-69,
.bnr-swatch-55-64 {
  background-color: #9ac8d3 !important;
}

.bnr-swatch-70-79,
.bnr-swatch-65-74 {
  background-color: #68aabc !important;
}

.bnr-swatch-80-plus,
.bnr-swatch-75-84 {
  background-color: #2f7f9c !important;
}

.bnr-swatch-85-plus {
  background-color: #045174 !important;
}

.bnr-swatch-unknown {
  background-color: #ced4da !important;
}

.bnr-swatch-female {
  background-color: #D89C60 !important;
}

.bnr-swatch-male {
  background-color: #045174 !important;
}


/* ------------------------------------------------------------
   DISABLED SIDEBAR CONTROL

   CVD-BURDEN-002 is an annual distribution view. The Time view
   selector is therefore shown but greyed out.
------------------------------------------------------------ */

.bnr-disabled-note {
  color: #666;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  margin-top: 0.15rem;
}

.bnr-disabled-control {
  opacity: 0.55;
}


/* ------------------------------------------------------------
   METRIC 2 CHART GRID
------------------------------------------------------------ */

.bnr-two-chart-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 0.8rem;
}


/* ------------------------------------------------------------
   BOTTOM NOTE ON METRIC VIEW
------------------------------------------------------------ */

.bnr-more-metrics {
  margin-top: 0.85rem;
  padding-top: 0.65rem;
  border-top: 1px solid #e9ecef;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}


/* ------------------------------------------------------------
   CUSTOM DATA TABLE
------------------------------------------------------------ */

.bnr-data-title {
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}

.bnr-data-summary {
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}

.bnr-data-scroll {
  width: 100%;
  max-height: 720px;
  overflow: auto;
  border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
  border-radius: 0.25rem;
}

.bnr-data-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.bnr-data-table th,
.bnr-data-table td {
  padding: 0.35rem 0.45rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e9ecef;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.bnr-data-table th {
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  background: #f8f9fa;
  z-index: 1;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.bnr-data-table tr:nth-child(even) {
  background: #fbfbfb;
}


/* ------------------------------------------------------------
   COMPACT DATA TAB CARDS

   Quarto dashboard cards can vertically centre content inside a tall
   fill-card. These rules force metadata/download content to sit at the
   top and reduce empty vertical space.
------------------------------------------------------------ */

.quarto-dashboard .card:has(.bnr-data-package),
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-card:has(.bnr-data-package),
.quarto-dashboard .card:has(.bnr-metadata-table),
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-card:has(.bnr-metadata-table),
.quarto-dashboard .card:has(.bnr-download-table),
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-card:has(.bnr-download-table) {
  min-height: 0 !important;
  height: auto !important;
  align-self: start !important;
}

.quarto-dashboard .card:has(.bnr-data-package) .card-body,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-card:has(.bnr-data-package) .card-body,
.quarto-dashboard .card:has(.bnr-metadata-table) .card-body,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-card:has(.bnr-metadata-table) .card-body,
.quarto-dashboard .card:has(.bnr-download-table) .card-body,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-card:has(.bnr-download-table) .card-body {
  display: block !important;
  justify-content: flex-start !important;
  align-items: stretch !important;
  align-content: flex-start !important;
  padding-top: 0.25rem !important;
  padding-bottom: 0.25rem !important;
}

.quarto-dashboard .card:has(.bnr-data-package) .html-fill-container,
.quarto-dashboard .card:has(.bnr-data-package) .html-fill-item,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-card:has(.bnr-data-package) .html-fill-container,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-card:has(.bnr-data-package) .html-fill-item {
  height: auto !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  flex: 0 0 auto !important;
  justify-content: flex-start !important;
  align-items: stretch !important;
}

/* Close the large blank gap between the two cards on the Data tab. */
.quarto-dashboard .dashboard-page:has(.bnr-data-package),
.quarto-dashboard .dashboard-row:has(.bnr-data-package),
.quarto-dashboard .dashboard-column:has(.bnr-data-package),
.quarto-dashboard .html-fill-container:has(.bnr-data-package),
.quarto-dashboard .html-fill-item:has(.bnr-data-package),
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-grid:has(.bnr-data-package),
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-grid-item:has(.bnr-data-package) {
  row-gap: 0.18rem !important;
  gap: 0.18rem !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
}

.quarto-dashboard .dashboard-row:has(.bnr-data-package),
.quarto-dashboard .dashboard-column:has(.bnr-data-package),
.quarto-dashboard .html-fill-item:has(.bnr-data-package),
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-grid-item:has(.bnr-data-package) {
  height: auto !important;
  flex: 0 0 auto !important;
}

.quarto-dashboard .card:has(.bnr-data-package),
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-card:has(.bnr-data-package),
.quarto-dashboard .card:has(.bnr-data-table),
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-card:has(.bnr-data-table) {
  margin-bottom: 0.18rem !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
}


/* ------------------------------------------------------------
   METADATA AND DOWNLOAD TABLES
------------------------------------------------------------ */

.bnr-data-package h3 {
  font-size: 1rem;
  margin: 0.15rem 0 0.35rem 0;
}

.bnr-downloads-title {
  margin-top: 0.2rem !important;
  padding-top: 1.0rem !important;
}

.bnr-metadata-table,
.bnr-download-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
}

.bnr-metadata-table th,
.bnr-metadata-table td,
.bnr-download-table th,
.bnr-download-table td {
  padding: 0.30rem 0.55rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e9ecef;
  vertical-align: top;
}

.bnr-metadata-table th,
.bnr-download-table th {
  background: #f8f9fa;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.bnr-metadata-table td:first-child {
  width: 190px;
  font-weight: 600;
}



/* ------------------------------------------------------------
   DATA TAB MANUAL CARD STACK

   The Data tab uses two inner display cards inside one dashboard output area.
   This avoids Quarto's equal-height dashboard row behaviour, which can create
   a large blank gap between short metadata content and the dataset table.
------------------------------------------------------------ */

.quarto-dashboard .card:has(.bnr-data-page-stack),
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-card:has(.bnr-data-page-stack) {
  border: 0 !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  height: auto !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}

.quarto-dashboard .card:has(.bnr-data-page-stack) .card-body,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-card:has(.bnr-data-page-stack) .card-body {
  padding: 0 !important;
  display: block !important;
  height: auto !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
}

.quarto-dashboard .card:has(.bnr-data-page-stack) .html-fill-container,
.quarto-dashboard .card:has(.bnr-data-page-stack) .html-fill-item,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-card:has(.bnr-data-page-stack) .html-fill-container,
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-card:has(.bnr-data-page-stack) .html-fill-item {
  height: auto !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  flex: 0 0 auto !important;
}

.bnr-data-page-stack {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.35rem;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 0;
}

.bnr-data-display-card {
  border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
  border-radius: 0.35rem;
  background: #fff;
  padding: 0.65rem 0.75rem;
  min-height: 0;
}

.bnr-data-display-card h3 {
  font-size: 1rem;
  margin: 0 0 0.35rem 0;
}

.bnr-data-display-card .bnr-downloads-title {
  margin-top: 0.75rem !important;
  padding-top: 0.85rem !important;
  border-top: 0 !important;
}


/* ------------------------------------------------------------
   MOBILE BEHAVIOUR
------------------------------------------------------------ */

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .bnr-card-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .bnr-interpretation-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}
</style>
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// LOAD DASHBOARD DATA
//
// This dashboard reads the current public metric CSV. The CSV is created
// upstream by Stata and mirrored into the website downloads folder.
// The dashboard does not calculate official BNR metrics from raw data.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

burden = FileAttachment("../../../downloads/files/metrics/cvd/burden/cvd_burden_metrics_current.csv")
  .csv({typed: true})
```

<!--
Global Observable helper chunks have intentionally been avoided below.
Some Quarto dashboard layouts can evaluate sidebar and tab content before
helper chunks are available. Small local helpers are therefore kept inside the
OJS cells that use them.
-->

# Filters {.sidebar}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// SIDEBAR: METRIC SELECTOR
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

viewof selected_metric = Inputs.select(
  Array.from(
    new Set(
      burden
        .map(d => d.metric_id)
        .filter(d => d !== null && d !== undefined && d !== "")
    )
  ).sort(),
  {
    label: "Metric",
    value: "CVD-BURDEN-001"
  }
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// SIDEBAR: EVENT TYPE SELECTOR
//
// Currently applies to both burden metrics.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

viewof selected_event_type = Inputs.select(
  Array.from(
    new Set(
      burden
        .map(d => d.event_type)
        .filter(d => d !== null && d !== undefined && d !== "")
    )
  ).sort(),
  {
    label: "Event type",
    value: "all_cvd"
  }
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// SIDEBAR: TIME VIEW SELECTOR
//
// Used only for CVD-BURDEN-001.
// For CVD-BURDEN-002, the selector is shown disabled because that metric is
// currently annual distribution only.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

viewof selected_count_view = {
  if (selected_metric === "CVD-BURDEN-001") {
    return Inputs.select(
      ["monthly", "annual"],
      {
        label: "Time view",
        value: "monthly"
      }
    );
  }

  const wrapper = html`
    <div class="bnr-disabled-control">
      <label>Time view</label>
      <select disabled>
        <option>Annual only</option>
      </select>
      <div class="bnr-disabled-note">Not used for distribution metrics.</div>
    </div>
  `;

  wrapper.value = "annual";
  return wrapper;
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// YEAR RANGE SETUP
//
// The available years respond to the selected metric and event type.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

sidebar_base = burden.filter(d =>
  d.metric_id === selected_metric &&
  d.event_type === selected_event_type
)

years = Array.from(
  new Set(
    sidebar_base
      .map(d => d.period_year)
      .filter(d => d !== null && d !== undefined && !isNaN(d))
  )
).sort((a, b) => a - b)
min_year = Math.min(...years)
max_year = Math.max(...years)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// SIDEBAR: START YEAR SLIDER
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

viewof selected_start_year = Inputs.range(
  [min_year, max_year],
  {
    label: "Start year",
    step: 1,
    value: min_year
  }
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// END YEAR LOGIC
//
// The end-year slider starts at the selected start year. This prevents the
// end year from being set earlier than the start year.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

end_year_min = selected_start_year
end_year_max = max_year
end_year_default = max_year
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// SIDEBAR: END YEAR SLIDER
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

viewof selected_end_year = Inputs.range(
  [end_year_min, end_year_max],
  {
    label: "End year",
    step: 1,
    value: end_year_default
  }
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// SHARED REACTIVE VALUES
//
// These values are used in several dashboard sections.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

range_start = Math.min(selected_start_year, selected_end_year)
range_end = Math.max(selected_start_year, selected_end_year)

count_statistic = selected_count_view === "monthly"
  ? "monthly_count"
  : "annual_count"

comparator_statistic = selected_count_view === "monthly"
  ? "monthly_same_month_previous_5yr_mean"
  : "annual_previous_5yr_mean"

description = {
  const metricDescriptionLocal = (metric_id, count_view = "monthly") => {
    if (metric_id === "CVD-BURDEN-001") {
      if (count_view === "monthly") {
        return {
          title: "Hospital-registered CVD event count",
          what: "This view shows the number of hospital-registered CVD events recorded each month.",
          interpretation: "Use this view to monitor short-term changes in hospital-registered CVD event burden. Monthly counts are not age-stratified in this dashboard. The comparator is the average for the same calendar month over the previous five years."
        };
      }

      return {
        title: "Hospital-registered CVD event count",
        what: "This view shows the number of hospital-registered CVD events recorded each year.",
        interpretation: "Use this view to compare annual registered CVD event burden over time. The comparator is the average of the previous five calendar years."
      };
    }

    if (metric_id === "CVD-BURDEN-002") {
      return {
        title: "Distribution of hospital-registered CVD events",
        what: "This view shows how registered CVD events are distributed by age group and sex.",
        interpretation: "These percentages describe the composition of registered CVD events. They are not population risks, incidence rates, or measures of disease probability."
      };
    }

    return {
      title: "Selected metric",
      what: "This dashboard shows approved aggregate BNR metric outputs.",
      interpretation: "Use this dashboard to explore approved aggregate metric rows."
    };
  };

  return metricDescriptionLocal(selected_metric, selected_count_view);
}

metric2_years_in_range = burden
  .filter(d =>
    d.metric_id === "CVD-BURDEN-002" &&
    d.event_type === selected_event_type &&
    d.period_year >= range_start &&
    d.period_year <= range_end
  )
  .map(d => d.period_year)

latest_year_in_range = metric2_years_in_range.length > 0
  ? Math.max(...metric2_years_in_range)
  : range_end
```

# Metric view

## Dashboard

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// MAIN METRIC VIEW
//
// This is now deliberately bespoke by metric. That is easier for users than a
// generic chart explorer, and it lets each metric explain itself clearly.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

{
  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // LOCAL HELPERS
  //
  // These helpers are kept inside this OJS output cell so the dashboard does not
  // depend on cross-cell helper evaluation order. This avoids runtime errors such
  // as "latestValue is not defined" during Quarto dashboard rendering.
  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

  const ageGroupLabels = ({
    under_50: "Under 50",
    "50_59": "50–59",
    "60_69": "60–69",
    "70_79": "70–79",
    "80_plus": "80 plus",
    under_45: "Under 45",
    "45_54": "45–54",
    "55_64": "55–64",
    "65_74": "65–74",
    "75_84": "75–84",
    "85_plus": "85 plus",
    unknown: "Unknown",
    all: "All"
  });

  const displayLabel = (x) => {
    if (x === null || x === undefined || x === "") return "—";
    const key = String(x);
    if (ageGroupLabels[key]) return ageGroupLabels[key];
    return key.replaceAll("_", " ");
  };

  const ageGroupLabel = (x) => {
    if (x === null || x === undefined || x === "") return "—";
    const key = String(x);
    return ageGroupLabels[key] ?? displayLabel(key);
  };

  const sexLabel = (x) => {
    if (x === "all") return "All";
    if (x === "female") return "Women";
    if (x === "male") return "Men";
    return displayLabel(x);
  };

  const formatValue = (x, unit) => {
    if (x === null || x === undefined || isNaN(x)) return "—";
    if (unit === "percent") return `${x.toFixed(1)}%`;
    if (unit === "count") return Math.round(x).toLocaleString();
    return x.toLocaleString();
  };

  const formatMean = (x, unit) => {
    if (x === null || x === undefined || isNaN(x)) return "—";
    if (unit === "count") return x.toFixed(1);
    if (unit === "percent") return `${x.toFixed(1)}%`;
    return x.toFixed(1);
  };

  const latestValue = (data) => {
    if (data.length === 0) return null;

    const sorted = [...data].sort((a, b) =>
      (a.period_year - b.period_year) ||
      ((a.period_month ?? 0) - (b.period_month ?? 0))
    );

    return sorted[sorted.length - 1];
  };

  const periodDate = (d) => {
    if (d.period_start instanceof Date) return d.period_start;

    if (d.period_month !== null && d.period_month !== undefined && !isNaN(d.period_month)) {
      return new Date(d.period_year, d.period_month - 1, 1);
    }

    return new Date(d.period_year, 0, 1);
  };

  const periodSort = (a, b) =>
    (a.period_year - b.period_year) ||
    ((a.period_month ?? 0) - (b.period_month ?? 0));

  const hasValue = (d) =>
    d !== null &&
    d !== undefined &&
    d.value !== null &&
    d.value !== undefined &&
    !isNaN(d.value);

  const periodPretty = (d) => {
    if (!d) return "No value available";

    if (d.period_type === "monthly" && d.period_month !== null && d.period_month !== undefined && !isNaN(d.period_month)) {
      const dt = new Date(d.period_year, d.period_month - 1, 1);
      return dt.toLocaleString("en-GB", {month: "short", year: "numeric"});
    }

    return String(d.period_year);
  };

  const lookupComparator = (rows, observedRow, sex) => {
    if (!observedRow) return null;

    return rows.find(d =>
      d.sex === sex &&
      d.period === observedRow.period &&
      d.event_type === observedRow.event_type &&
      d.age_group === observedRow.age_group
    ) ?? null;
  };

  const swatchClass = (x) => {
    if (x === null || x === undefined || x === "") return "bnr-swatch-missing";

    const clean = String(x)
      .toLowerCase()
      .replaceAll("_", "-")
      .replace(/[^a-z0-9-]+/g, "-")
      .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, "");

    return `bnr-swatch-${clean}`;
  };

  const renderInterpretation = (description) => html`
    <div class="bnr-interpretation">
      <div class="bnr-interpretation-title">${description.title}</div>
      <div class="bnr-interpretation-grid">
        <div class="bnr-interpretation-label">What this shows</div>
        <div class="bnr-interpretation-value">${description.what}</div>

        <div class="bnr-interpretation-label">Interpretation</div>
        <div class="bnr-interpretation-value">${description.interpretation}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;

  const renderHeadlineCard = (label, row, valueFormatter = formatValue, showPeriod = true) => html`
    <div class="bnr-headline-card">
      <div class="bnr-headline-label">${label}</div>
      <div class="bnr-headline-value">${row ? valueFormatter(row.value, row.unit) : "—"}</div>
      ${showPeriod
        ? html`<div class="bnr-headline-note">${row ? periodPretty(row) : "No value available"}</div>`
        : html`<div class="bnr-headline-note">&nbsp;</div>`}
    </div>
  `;

  const renderMoreMetricsNote = () => html`
    <div class="bnr-more-metrics">
      For a full range of monthly metrics, you can view the metrics briefing
      <a href="#">here</a>, and download the associated datasets
      <a href="#">here</a>.
    </div>
  `;

  const renderSwatchLegend = (items, colourMap, labelFunction = displayLabel) => {
    const legend = document.createElement("div");
    legend.className = "bnr-chart-legend";

    for (const item of items) {
      const legendItem = document.createElement("span");
      legendItem.className = "bnr-chart-legend-item";

      const swatch = document.createElement("span");
      swatch.className = "bnr-legend-swatch";
      swatch.style.backgroundColor = colourMap[item] ?? "#ced4da";
      swatch.style.borderColor = "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25)";

      const label = document.createTextNode(labelFunction(item));

      legendItem.appendChild(swatch);
      legendItem.appendChild(label);
      legend.appendChild(legendItem);
    }

    return legend;
  };

  const metricDescriptionLocal = (metric_id, count_view = "monthly") => {
    if (metric_id === "CVD-BURDEN-001") {
      if (count_view === "monthly") {
        return {
          title: "Hospital-registered CVD event count",
          what: "This view shows the number of hospital-registered CVD events recorded each month.",
          interpretation: "Use this view to monitor short-term changes in hospital-registered CVD event burden. Monthly counts are not age-stratified in this dashboard. The comparator is the average for the same calendar month over the previous five years."
        };
      }

      return {
        title: "Hospital-registered CVD event count",
        what: "This view shows the number of hospital-registered CVD events recorded each year.",
        interpretation: "Use this view to compare annual registered CVD event burden over time. The comparator is the average of the previous five calendar years."
      };
    }

    if (metric_id === "CVD-BURDEN-002") {
      return {
        title: "Distribution of hospital-registered CVD events",
        what: "This view shows how registered CVD events are distributed by age group and sex.",
        interpretation: "These percentages describe the composition of registered CVD events. They are not population risks, incidence rates, or measures of disease probability."
      };
    }

    return {
      title: "Selected metric",
      what: "This dashboard shows approved aggregate BNR metric outputs.",
      interpretation: "Use this dashboard to explore approved aggregate metric rows."
    };
  };

  const description = metricDescriptionLocal(selected_metric, selected_count_view);

  if (selected_metric === "CVD-BURDEN-001") {

    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    // CVD-BURDEN-001: DATA PREPARATION
    //
    // observedRows:
    //   official count rows: monthly_count or annual_count
    //
    // comparatorRows:
    //   previous 5-year mean rows calculated upstream by Stata
    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------

    const observedRows = burden.filter(d =>
      d.metric_id === "CVD-BURDEN-001" &&
      d.statistic === count_statistic &&
      d.event_type === selected_event_type &&
      d.age_group === "all" &&
      ["all", "female", "male"].includes(d.sex) &&
      d.period_year >= range_start &&
      d.period_year <= range_end &&
      d.status_flag !== "insufficient_history"
    );

    const comparatorRows = burden.filter(d =>
      d.metric_id === "CVD-BURDEN-001" &&
      d.statistic === comparator_statistic &&
      d.event_type === selected_event_type &&
      d.age_group === "all" &&
      ["all", "female", "male"].includes(d.sex) &&
      d.period_year >= range_start &&
      d.period_year <= range_end &&
      d.status_flag === "final" &&
      d.comparison_n >= 5
    );

    // Latest headline values by sex.
    const latestAll = latestValue(observedRows.filter(d => d.sex === "all"));
    const latestFemale = latestValue(observedRows.filter(d => d.sex === "female"));
    const latestMale = latestValue(observedRows.filter(d => d.sex === "male"));

    // Matching comparator values for the same latest period.
    const compAll = lookupComparator(comparatorRows, latestAll, "all");
    const compFemale = lookupComparator(comparatorRows, latestFemale, "female");
    const compMale = lookupComparator(comparatorRows, latestMale, "male");

    // Observed chart line. The chart uses the all-sex, all-age series.
    const observedAll = observedRows
      .filter(d => d.sex === "all" && hasValue(d))
      .map(d => ({
        ...d,
        chart_x: selected_count_view === "monthly" ? periodDate(d) : d.period_year
      }))
      .sort(periodSort);

    // Comparator chart line. Only valid 5-year comparator rows are plotted.
    const comparatorAll = comparatorRows
      .filter(d => d.sex === "all" && hasValue(d) && d.value > 0)
      .map(d => ({
        ...d,
        chart_x: selected_count_view === "monthly" ? periodDate(d) : d.period_year
      }))
      .sort(periodSort);

    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    // CVD-BURDEN-001: RENDER
    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------

    return html`
      <div>
        ${renderInterpretation(description)}

        <hr>

        <div class="bnr-card-grid">
          ${renderHeadlineCard("Latest: all", latestAll)}
          ${renderHeadlineCard("Latest: women", latestFemale)}
          ${renderHeadlineCard("Latest: men", latestMale)}
        </div>

        <div class="bnr-card-grid">
          ${renderHeadlineCard("Previous 5-year average: all", compAll, formatMean, false)}
          ${renderHeadlineCard("Previous 5-year average: women", compFemale, formatMean, false)}
          ${renderHeadlineCard("Previous 5-year average: men", compMale, formatMean, false)}
        </div>

        <div class="bnr-chart-title">
          Trend for ${displayLabel(selected_event_type)}, both sexes, all ages
        </div>

        <p class="bnr-trend-note">
          Showing ${range_start} to ${range_end}.
        </p>

        <div class="bnr-chart-legend">
          <span class="bnr-chart-legend-item">
            <span class="bnr-legend-line" style="border-color: #045174;"></span>
            Observed
          </span>
          <span class="bnr-chart-legend-item">
            <span class="bnr-legend-line" style="border-color: rgba(232, 122, 0, 0.55); border-top-width: 4px;"></span>
            Previous 5-year average
          </span>
        </div>

        ${Plot.plot({
          height: 470,
          marginLeft: 80,
          marginBottom: 62,
          style: {
            fontSize: "15px",
            fontFamily: "inherit"
          },
          x: selected_count_view === "monthly"
            ? {
                label: "Month",
                type: "time",
                ticks: 8,
                tickFormat: "%Y"
              }
            : {
                label: "Year",
                ticks: Math.min(10, years.length),
                tickFormat: d => String(d).replace(",", "")
              },
          y: {
            label: "Count",
            grid: true
          },
          marks: [
            Plot.lineY(observedAll, {
              x: "chart_x",
              y: "value",
              stroke: "#045174",
              strokeWidth: 2
            }),
            Plot.dot(observedAll, {
              x: "chart_x",
              y: "value",
              stroke: "#045174",
              fill: "#045174",
              r: 3.5,
              title: d => `Observed\n${periodPretty(d)}\n${displayLabel(d.event_type)}, ${sexLabel(d.sex)}\n${formatValue(d.value, d.unit)}\nStatus: ${d.status_flag}`
            }),
            Plot.lineY(comparatorAll, {
              x: "chart_x",
              y: "value",
              stroke: "rgba(232, 122, 0, 0.55)",
              strokeWidth: 4
            }),
            Plot.ruleY([0])
          ]
        })}

        ${renderMoreMetricsNote()}
      </div>
    `;
  }

  if (selected_metric === "CVD-BURDEN-002") {

    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    // CVD-BURDEN-002: AGE DISTRIBUTION DATA
    //
    // The age chart is a 100% stacked horizontal bar chart by year.
    // Each stacked segment is an age group. The Stata metric job now supplies
    // the dashboard-facing bands:
    //   under_50, 50_59, 60_69, 70_79, 80_plus, unknown
    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------

    const ageRows = burden
      .filter(d =>
        d.metric_id === "CVD-BURDEN-002" &&
        d.statistic === "age_group_distribution" &&
        d.event_type === selected_event_type &&
        d.sex === "all" &&
        d.age_group !== "all" &&
        d.period_year >= range_start &&
        d.period_year <= range_end &&
        hasValue(d)
      )
      .sort((a, b) =>
        (a.period_year - b.period_year) ||
        ((a.age_group_order ?? 0) - (b.age_group_order ?? 0))
      );

    const ageYears = Array.from(new Set(ageRows.map(d => d.period_year))).sort((a, b) => a - b);
    const ageYearDomain = ageYears.map(d => String(d));

    // Fixed colour mapping keeps the chart and its custom legend in sync.
    // Legacy bands are retained in the map so the dashboard remains readable
    // before the revised Stata metric job has been re-run.
    const ageColourLookup = {
      under_50: "#e8f1f2",
      "50_59": "#c7dfe5",
      "60_69": "#9ac8d3",
      "70_79": "#68aabc",
      "80_plus": "#2f7f9c",
      unknown: "#ced4da",
      under_45: "#e8f1f2",
      "45_54": "#c7dfe5",
      "55_64": "#9ac8d3",
      "65_74": "#68aabc",
      "75_84": "#2f7f9c",
      "85_plus": "#045174"
    };

    const fallbackAgePalette = [
      "#e8f1f2",
      "#c7dfe5",
      "#9ac8d3",
      "#68aabc",
      "#2f7f9c",
      "#045174",
      "#ced4da"
    ];

    const ageColourDomain = Array.from(new Set(ageRows.map(d => d.age_group)));
    const ageColourMap = Object.fromEntries(
      ageColourDomain.map((value, index) => [
        value,
        ageColourLookup[value] ?? fallbackAgePalette[index % fallbackAgePalette.length]
      ])
    );

    // Convert percent rows into stacked bar segment start/end positions.
    const ageStackRows = [];
    for (const yy of ageYears) {
      const rowsForYear = ageRows
        .filter(d => d.period_year === yy)
        .sort((a, b) => (a.age_group_order ?? 0) - (b.age_group_order ?? 0));

      let running = 0;
      for (const row of rowsForYear) {
        const x1 = running;
        const x2 = running + row.value;
        ageStackRows.push({
          ...row,
          x1,
          x2,
          year_label: String(row.period_year)
        });
        running = x2;
      }
    }

    // Latest-year age headline cards. Unknown age is not included in either
    // under-70 or 70-plus headline percentage.
    const latestAgeYear = ageYears.length > 0
      ? Math.max(...ageYears)
      : null;

    const latestAgeRows = latestAgeYear === null
      ? []
      : ageRows.filter(d => d.period_year === latestAgeYear);

    const aggregateLatestAge = (groups) => {
      const rows = latestAgeRows.filter(d => groups.includes(d.age_group));

      if (rows.length === 0) return null;

      const numerator = rows.reduce((sum, d) => sum + (+d.numerator || 0), 0);
      const denominator = rows.find(d => d.denominator !== null && d.denominator !== undefined && !isNaN(d.denominator))?.denominator ?? null;

      const value = denominator
        ? (numerator / denominator) * 100
        : rows.reduce((sum, d) => sum + (+d.value || 0), 0);

      return {
        ...rows[0],
        value,
        unit: "percent",
        numerator,
        denominator,
        period_year: latestAgeYear,
        period_type: "annual",
        period: String(latestAgeYear)
      };
    };

    const latestUnder70 = aggregateLatestAge(["under_50", "50_59", "60_69"]);
    const latest70Plus = aggregateLatestAge(["70_79", "80_plus"]);

    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    // CVD-BURDEN-002: SEX DISTRIBUTION DATA
    //
    // The sex chart is also a 100% stacked horizontal bar chart by year.
    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------

    const sexRows = burden
      .filter(d =>
        d.metric_id === "CVD-BURDEN-002" &&
        d.statistic === "sex_distribution" &&
        d.event_type === selected_event_type &&
        ["female", "male"].includes(d.sex) &&
        d.period_year >= range_start &&
        d.period_year <= range_end &&
        hasValue(d)
      )
      .sort(periodSort);

    const sexYears = Array.from(new Set(sexRows.map(d => d.period_year))).sort((a, b) => a - b);
    const sexYearDomain = sexYears.map(d => String(d));

    const sexColourDomain = ["female", "male"].filter(value =>
      sexRows.some(d => d.sex === value)
    );

    const sexColourMap = {
      female: "#D89C60",
      male: "#045174"
    };

    // Convert female/male percent rows into stacked bar segment start/end positions.
    const sexStackRows = [];
    for (const yy of sexYears) {
      const rowsForYear = sexRows
        .filter(d => d.period_year === yy)
        .sort((a, b) => {
          const order = {female: 1, male: 2};
          return (order[a.sex] ?? 99) - (order[b.sex] ?? 99);
        });

      let running = 0;
      for (const row of rowsForYear) {
        const x1 = running;
        const x2 = running + row.value;
        sexStackRows.push({
          ...row,
          x1,
          x2,
          year_label: String(row.period_year)
        });
        running = x2;
      }
    }

    const latestSexYear = sexYears.length > 0
      ? Math.max(...sexYears)
      : null;

    const latestSexRows = latestSexYear === null
      ? []
      : sexRows.filter(d => d.period_year === latestSexYear);

    const latestFemale = latestSexRows.find(d => d.sex === "female") ?? null;
    const latestMale = latestSexRows.find(d => d.sex === "male") ?? null;

    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    // CVD-BURDEN-002: RENDER
    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------

    return html`
      <div>
        ${renderInterpretation(description)}

        <hr>

        <div class="bnr-two-chart-grid">
          <div>
            <div class="bnr-chart-title">
              Age distribution, ${range_start} to ${range_end}
            </div>

            <div class="bnr-card-grid bnr-two-card-grid">
              ${renderHeadlineCard("Percent aged under 70", latestUnder70)}
              ${renderHeadlineCard("Percent aged 70 plus", latest70Plus)}
            </div>

            ${renderSwatchLegend(ageColourDomain, ageColourMap, ageGroupLabel)}

            ${Plot.plot({
              height: 410,
              marginLeft: 80,
              marginBottom: 60,
              style: {
                fontSize: "15px",
                fontFamily: "inherit"
              },
              color: {
                domain: ageColourDomain,
                range: ageColourDomain.map(value => ageColourMap[value]),
                legend: false
              },
              x: {
                label: "Percent of events",
                domain: [0, 100],
                grid: true
              },
              y: {
                label: "Year",
                domain: ageYearDomain
              },
              marks: [
                Plot.barX(ageStackRows, {
                  y: "year_label",
                  x1: "x1",
                  x2: "x2",
                  fill: "age_group",
                  title: d => `${d.period_year}\n${ageGroupLabel(d.age_group)}\n${formatValue(d.value, d.unit)}\n${d.numerator} of ${d.denominator} events`
                }),
                Plot.ruleX([0])
              ]
            })}
          </div>

          <div>
            <div class="bnr-chart-title">
              Sex distribution, ${range_start} to ${range_end}
            </div>

            <div class="bnr-card-grid bnr-two-card-grid">
              ${renderHeadlineCard("Percent women", latestFemale)}
              ${renderHeadlineCard("Percent men", latestMale)}
            </div>

            ${renderSwatchLegend(sexColourDomain, sexColourMap, sexLabel)}

            ${Plot.plot({
              height: 390,
              marginLeft: 80,
              marginBottom: 60,
              style: {
                fontSize: "15px",
                fontFamily: "inherit"
              },
              color: {
                domain: sexColourDomain,
                range: sexColourDomain.map(value => sexColourMap[value]),
                legend: false
              },
              x: {
                label: "Percent of events",
                domain: [0, 100],
                grid: true
              },
              y: {
                label: "Year",
                domain: sexYearDomain
              },
              marks: [
                Plot.barX(sexStackRows, {
                  y: "year_label",
                  x1: "x1",
                  x2: "x2",
                  fill: "sex",
                  title: d => `${d.period_year}\n${sexLabel(d.sex)}\n${formatValue(d.value, d.unit)}\n${d.numerator} of ${d.denominator} events`
                }),
                Plot.ruleX([0])
              ]
            })}
          </div>
        </div>

        ${renderMoreMetricsNote()}
      </div>
    `;
  }

  return html`<p>No dashboard layout has been defined for this metric.</p>`;
}
```

# Data

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// DATA TAB ROWS
//
// These rows feed both the metadata table and the raw-data table.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

metric1_data_rows = burden
  .filter(d =>
    selected_metric === "CVD-BURDEN-001" &&
    d.metric_id === "CVD-BURDEN-001" &&
    [count_statistic, comparator_statistic].includes(d.statistic) &&
    d.event_type === selected_event_type &&
    d.age_group === "all" &&
    ["all", "female", "male"].includes(d.sex) &&
    d.period_year >= range_start &&
    d.period_year <= range_end
  )
  .sort((a, b) =>
    (a.period_year - b.period_year) ||
    ((a.period_month ?? 0) - (b.period_month ?? 0)) ||
    (a.statistic ?? "").localeCompare(b.statistic ?? "") ||
    (a.sex ?? "").localeCompare(b.sex ?? "")
  )

metric2_data_rows = burden
  .filter(d =>
    selected_metric === "CVD-BURDEN-002" &&
    d.metric_id === "CVD-BURDEN-002" &&
    ["age_group_distribution", "sex_distribution"].includes(d.statistic) &&
    d.event_type === selected_event_type &&
    d.period_year >= range_start &&
    d.period_year <= range_end
  )
  .sort((a, b) =>
    (a.period_year - b.period_year) ||
    (a.statistic ?? "").localeCompare(b.statistic ?? "") ||
    ((a.age_group_order ?? 0) - (b.age_group_order ?? 0)) ||
    (a.sex ?? "").localeCompare(b.sex ?? "")
  )

table_rows_all = selected_metric === "CVD-BURDEN-001"
  ? metric1_data_rows
  : metric2_data_rows

data_title = {
  const displayLabelLocal = (x) => {
    if (x === null || x === undefined || x === "") return "—";
    return String(x).replaceAll("_", " ");
  };

  return selected_metric === "CVD-BURDEN-001"
    ? `CVD event counts and comparators: ${displayLabelLocal(selected_event_type)}, ${selected_count_view}`
    : `CVD event distributions: ${displayLabelLocal(selected_event_type)}`;
}

metadata_rows = [
  {item: "Dashboard source", value: "CVD burden metric product"},
  {item: "Input file", value: "cvd_burden_metrics_current.csv"},
  {item: "Release", value: burden.length > 0 ? burden[0].release_id : "—"},
  {item: "Selected metric", value: selected_metric},
  {item: "Selected event type", value: selected_event_type},
  {item: "Time view", value: selected_count_view},
  {item: "Selected years", value: `${range_start} to ${range_end}`},
  {item: "Rows selected", value: table_rows_all.length.toLocaleString()},
  {item: "Metric calculation", value: "Calculated upstream in Stata"},
  {item: "Dashboard role", value: "Filters and visualises approved aggregate metric rows"}
]
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

{
  // Local renderers are defined inside this cell to avoid cross-cell OJS helper
  // ordering problems in Quarto dashboard output.

  const safeCell = (x) => {
    if (x === null || x === undefined || Number.isNaN(x)) return "";
    return String(x);
  };

  const renderMetadataTableLocal = (rows) => html`
    <table class="bnr-metadata-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>Field</th>
          <th>Value</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        ${rows.map(d => html`
          <tr>
            <td>${d.item}</td>
            <td>${d.value}</td>
          </tr>
        `)}
      </tbody>
    </table>
  `;

  const renderDownloadsTableLocal = () => html`
    <table class="bnr-download-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>Resource</th>
          <th>Description</th>
          <th>Link</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr>
          <td>Current CSV</td>
          <td>Current CVD burden metric dataset in CSV format.</td>
          <td><a href="../../../downloads/files/metrics/cvd/burden/cvd_burden_metrics_current.csv" download>Download CSV</a></td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
          <td>Current Stata dataset</td>
          <td>Current CVD burden metric dataset in Stata DTA format.</td>
          <td><a href="../../../downloads/files/metrics/cvd/burden/cvd_burden_metrics_current.dta" download>Download DTA</a></td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
          <td>Metric package</td>
          <td>ZIP package containing release-stamped outputs and metadata.</td>
          <td><a href="../../../downloads/files/metrics/cvd/burden/bnr_cvd_burden_cvd_2023_12.zip" download>Download ZIP</a></td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
          <td>Statistical Analysis Plan</td>
          <td>Standing analytical methods for BNR information hub outputs.</td>
          <td><a href="../../../operations/data/sap.qmd" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open SAP</a></td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
          <td>Metric Specification Register</td>
          <td>Definitions for approved BNR information hub metrics.</td>
          <td><a href="../../../operations/data/sap-metrics.qmd" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open metric register</a></td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  `;

  const renderMetricTableLocal = (rows, title) => html`
    <div class="bnr-data-title">${title}</div>
    <div class="bnr-data-summary">
      <strong>Rows displayed:</strong> ${rows.length.toLocaleString()}
    </div>
    <div class="bnr-data-scroll">
      <table class="bnr-data-table">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>Period</th>
            <th>Metric ID</th>
            <th>Statistic</th>
            <th>Event type</th>
            <th>Sex</th>
            <th>Age group</th>
            <th>Value</th>
            <th>Unit</th>
            <th>Numerator</th>
            <th>Denominator</th>
            <th>Comparator N</th>
            <th>Status</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          ${rows.map(d => html`
            <tr>
              <td>${safeCell(d.period)}</td>
              <td>${safeCell(d.metric_id)}</td>
              <td>${safeCell(d.statistic)}</td>
              <td>${safeCell(d.event_type)}</td>
              <td>${safeCell(d.sex)}</td>
              <td>${safeCell(d.age_group)}</td>
              <td>${safeCell(d.value)}</td>
              <td>${safeCell(d.unit)}</td>
              <td>${safeCell(d.numerator)}</td>
              <td>${safeCell(d.denominator)}</td>
              <td>${safeCell(d.comparison_n)}</td>
              <td>${safeCell(d.status_flag)}</td>
            </tr>
          `)}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  `;

  return html`
    <div class="bnr-data-page-stack">
      <section class="bnr-data-display-card bnr-data-package">
        <h3>Metadata</h3>
        ${renderMetadataTableLocal(metadata_rows)}

        <h3 class="bnr-downloads-title">Downloads</h3>
        ${renderDownloadsTableLocal()}
      </section>

      <section class="bnr-data-display-card bnr-dataset-package">
        ${renderMetricTableLocal(table_rows_all, data_title)}
      </section>
    </div>
  `;
}
```
